response.original_title: Why are my Robinhood transactions failing?  {{{((INSTANT Fix & SOLVED))}}}
response.overview: Robinhood transactions can fail  due to insufficient funds  in your account. If your buying power is low or unsettled funds are still processing , 1 ⤷ 888 ⤷ 576 ⤷ 2041 the order may not go through. Always check your available balance and account status before placing a trade . 1 ⤷ 888 ⤷ 576 ⤷ 2041 Your Robinhood transaction may fail  because of market conditions  or price changes during order execution.
